name: io.github.iamsamuelfraga/mcp-hubspot
description: Enterprise-grade HubSpot CRM integration with 37 MCP tools for sales, workflows, and automation (+ 16 conditional actions tools with developer key = 53 total)

HUBSPOT_TOOLSETS.description: Comma-separated toolsets to enable. Valid values: sales, engagements, associations, properties, workflows, automation, actions. Defaults to all toolsets. Note: 'actions' also requires HUBSPOT_DEVELOPER_API_KEY.

HUBSPOT_DEVELOPER_API_KEY.description: HubSpot developer API key (hapikey). Required to activate the 16 'actions' toolset tools for Custom Workflow Action definitions. Obtain from developers.hubspot.com.

HUBSPOT_APP_ID.description: HubSpot App ID that owns the custom action definitions. Required when using the 'actions' toolset.

LOG_LEVEL.description: Logging verbosity: debug, info, warn, error. Defaults to info.
